description: Complete power delivery chain from USB-C input to SoC power pins. 7 sequential stages. M1 (T8103) architecture - no MagSafe, two USB-C ports only.
WARNING: A2337 (820-02016) M1 Air. Power input is USB-C only (no MagSafe). PMU naming: SERA=Master (U8100), SIMETRA=Slave (U7700). UC300 produces 5V S2. UC710 produces 3V3 S2. UC120 produces 1.8V AON.

stages.name: USB-C Input & Initial 5V
stages.description: USB-C cable inserted. CD3217 port controllers manage CC signaling and VBUS switching. No MagSafe on this model.

stages.name: PD Negotiation & 20V Boost
stages.description: CD3217 reads firmware from SPI ROM, negotiates USB PD to request 20V from charger adapter. SoC sends command to CD3217 after hard start.

stages.name: Charger -> PPBUS_AON
stages.description: Charger IC (U5200) converts USB-C input to PPBUS_AON. Battery also connects to PPBUS_AON via J5100 connector and Q5270 MOSFET.

stages.name: SVR AON -> PP3V8_AON
stages.description: U5700 multi-phase buck converts PPBUS_AON to 3.8V always-on rail. Master rail for both PMUs and external AON LDOs.

stages.name: PMU Distribution
stages.description: PP3V8_AON feeds both SPMU/SIMETRA (U7700) and MPMU/SERA (U8100). Each generates buck, LDO, and switch outputs for SoC and peripheral power domains.

stages.name: Standalone Regulators & Load Switches
stages.description: UC300 and UC710 produce 5V and 3.3V S2 rails from PPBUS_AON. Load switches gate power to subsystems (IPD, sensors).

stages.name: SoC Power Domains
stages.description: Final rails reaching SoC U6000 (M1 T8103) pin groups. PCPU, ECPU, GPU from ACTIVE bucks. DDR/SRAM from SLEEP bucks. IO and fixed from LDOs.
